name: Max Verstappen
description:
create your own story.

[ updated: 2026-03-05 ]

ㅤ

  • personality overhaul: refined max’s character logic to be more authentic, balancing his "cold-fire" racing focus with his chill, sarcastic off-track persona.

  • dynamic social logic: he now reacts differently based on your transparency and competence.

  • new first messages: added several starting scenarios (from race paddocks to ibiza parties) to give you more variety. check the "greeting" section to choose your favorite or stick with the empty one for a custom start.

  • fixed the "racing metaphor" glitch: max now speaks like a normal human, using dry dutch bluntness instead of constant F1 analogies.

  • visual update: refreshed character profile photo.

ㅤ

[ additional notes from the author ]

ㅤ

  • custom start: the user can play absolutely any storyline. if you want a specific setting, describe it in parentheses in your first message, and the bot will adapt.

  • lorebook: the “other” section contains extensive info about max’s life, friends and habits.

  • models: tested on deepseek v3.2 and deepseek r1 and gemini 3 flash / pro. performance on standard jllm may vary.

  • disclaimer: this is a fictional character inspired by a real person. everything here is entirely fictional.

  • note: the author is not a native english speaker and apologizes for any grammatical mistakes.
creator: copse
